name: Kaviya Maickavasagam Panneerselvam

whoami.transition: My journey into cybersecurity began in electronics. During my Bachelor's in Electronics & Communication Engineering, I was constantly fascinated by how data travels — signals, protocols, transmission layers. But the more I understood how data moved, the more I asked: how is it protected? What ensures its integrity? Who stops it from being intercepted? That curiosity led me to pursue a Master of Cyber Security at the University of Adelaide, where I turned that foundational technical knowledge into a specialisation in securing the very systems I once studied.
whoami.specialisation: I specialise in Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC) — helping organisations not just comply with frameworks like ISO 27001:2022, NIST CSF 2.0, and ACSC Essential Eight, but actually close the gap between policy and real-world security posture. I pair that with hands-on skills in threat detection, incident response, and applied AI/ML security research.
whoami.whyhire: I bring something rare: an engineer's understanding of how systems work, combined with a security analyst's instinct for how they fail. I don't just flag risks — I contextualise them, prioritise them, and recommend controls that are practical and measurable. Whether it's auditing smart contracts with LLMs, simulating IoT adversarial attacks, or conducting GRC assessments for SMBs — I approach every problem with rigour, curiosity, and a bias toward action.

securityMindset.title: Risk-First Thinking
securityMindset.description: I don't treat all vulnerabilities equally. Every finding is assessed through the lens of business impact, likelihood, and exploitability — prioritising what matters most to the organisation's risk appetite, not just what scores highest on a CVSS chart.

securityMindset.title: Compliance ≠ Real Security
securityMindset.description: Ticking compliance checkboxes doesn't mean you're secure. I look beyond framework alignment to identify the gaps between documented controls and actual implementation — because that's where real threats live.

securityMindset.title: The Human Factor
securityMindset.description: Technology is only one layer. My GRC work consistently shows that phishing awareness, password hygiene, and staff behaviour are as critical as any technical control. Security culture is a control — and often the weakest one.

bullets: Designed and distributed a security awareness survey aligned with ISO 27001:2022 to assess staff knowledge of secure online practices.
Identified knowledge gaps in phishing awareness, unsafe link handling, password hygiene, and customer data protection.
Reviewed access permissions, data handling practices, and privacy settings within the reservation platform.
Recommended short-term and long-term security controls to support the Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability (CIA) of business and customer data.
Analysed security logs and events to detect potential threats using company-standard playbooks and incident response procedures.
Assisted in vulnerability assessments and threat analysis activities.
Supported development of an incident response plan based on NIST SP 800-61 guidelines.
Contributed to internal Power BI dashboards to monitor operational and security risks.
Applied network security fundamentals including TCP/IP, routing and switching, and secure network architecture.
Analysed network traffic and configurations to identify vulnerabilities and misconfigurations.
Gained hands-on exposure to firewall concepts, access control mechanisms, and network segmentation.
Documented security controls aligned with CIA principles to support network integrity and availability.

mastersProjects.title: Smart Contract Vulnerability Detector using LLM
mastersProjects.description: Research Capstone Project: Explored the integration of AI in cybersecurity to enhance threat detection and strengthen GRC through intelligent risk monitoring.Built a hybrid smart contract auditing system combining regex-based static analysis with Google Gemini LLM to detect critical Solidity vulnerabilities. Developed a 5-stage JSON repair pipeline and Streamlit dashboard for real-time analysis and downloadable audit reports.

mastersProjects.title: Man-in-the-Middle Attacks on MQTT IoT using Adversarial ML
mastersProjects.description: Designed an adversarial testing framework for MQTT-based IoT systems to simulate MITM attacks and evaluate communication security. Applied ML models to detect anomalous traffic under adversarial perturbations.

mastersProjects.title: Safe Home Service — Privacy-by-Design Web App
mastersProjects.description: Developed a secure full-stack MERN application with privacy-by-design principles, decentralised contact tracing, and integrated authentication/authorisation controls to minimise personal data exposure.

mastersProjects.title: Security Awareness & GRC Assessment — Le Souk
mastersProjects.description: Conducted an ISO 27001:2022-aligned staff security awareness assessment for a hospitality SMB. Identified phishing and access control gaps and delivered actionable short and long-term security recommendations.

undergradProjects.title: Virtual Eye for Typhlotic People
undergradProjects.description: An assistive technology solution designed to help visually impaired individuals navigate their environment using embedded sensing and real-time audio feedback.

undergradProjects.title: Abode Autonetics using IoT
undergradProjects.description: A smart home automation system using IoT protocols for remote monitoring and control of home appliances — focused on secure and reliable device communication.

undergradProjects.title: Abode Cleaning Assistant — Bluetooth RC Control
undergradProjects.description: A Bluetooth-controlled robotic cleaning assistant built for automated home cleaning. Focused on wireless communication protocols and embedded control logic.

undergradProjects.title: Retriever — Selected for R&D Product Conversion
undergradProjects.description: A retrieval system project that was selected and requested to be turned into a commercial product by the R&D department — demonstrating real-world applicability and innovation.

publications.title: Pipelined Half-Precision Floating Point ALU
publications.journal: IJARSCT — International Journal of Advanced Research in Science, Communication and Technology
publications.description: Designed and implemented a pipelined half-precision floating point Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU), optimising computational efficiency through hardware-level pipeline staging.

projects.title: Smart Contract Vulnerability Detector
projects.description: AI-powered auditing tool combining Google Gemini LLM + static analysis to detect critical Solidity vulnerabilities.

projects.title: MQTT IoT Adversarial ML Attack Framework
projects.description: Adversarial testing framework to simulate Man-in-the-Middle attacks on MQTT IoT systems using ML anomaly detection.

projects.title: Safe Home Service — Secure Web App
projects.description: Privacy-by-design MERN application with decentralised contact tracing and secure authentication controls.

services.title: 🔍 Threat Detection & Incident Response
services.description: Experienced in analysing security logs, identifying threats, and responding to incidents using NIST SP 800-61 and industry-standard playbooks.

services.title: 🛡️ Vulnerability Assessment
services.description: Skilled in identifying, analysing, and mitigating vulnerabilities across applications, networks, and IoT systems using structured methodologies.

services.title: 📋 Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC)
services.description: Hands-on experience applying ISO 27001:2022, NIST CSF 2.0, and ACSC Essential Eight frameworks to strengthen organisational security posture.

services.title: 🤖 AI & ML for Cybersecurity
services.description: Applied supervised and unsupervised ML for anomaly detection, adversarial attack simulation, and smart contract vulnerability auditing.

certifications.title: Connect and Protect: Networks and Network Security
Play It Safe: Manage Security Risks

aboutpara: I'm Kaviya — a Cybersecurity Master's graduate from the University of Adelaide with a passion for making systems resilient before adversaries can exploit them. I specialise in GRC and bring hands-on experience across SOC operations, vulnerability assessment, secure software development, and AI-driven security research.

resume.tagline: Cybersecurity Analyst | GRC | Threat Detection | AI Security Research
resume.description: Master's graduate in Cybersecurity from the University of Adelaide (Global Citizens Scholarship Recipient). Experienced across SOC operations, vulnerability assessment, incident response, GRC, and applied AI/ML security research.

experiences.position: Cyber Security Intern at Le Souk, Adelaide
experiences.bullets: ISO 27001:2022-aligned security awareness assessment, Identified phishing and access control gaps, Recommended CIA-preserving security controls

experiences.position: Cyber Security Analyst Trainee at Cognizant, India
experiences.bullets: Security log analysis and threat detection, NIST SP 800-61 incident response planning, Power BI security dashboards

experiences.position: Network Security Intern at BSNL, India
experiences.bullets: Network traffic analysis and vulnerability identification, Firewall and access control implementation, CIA-aligned security documentation

education.universityName: University of Adelaide — Master of Cyber Security
education.universityPara: Recipient of the Global Citizens Scholarship. Completed applied research in IoT security, ML-based anomaly detection, and smart contract vulnerability auditing.

softSkills.title: Cultural Awareness
softSkills.description: Having lived and worked across India and Australia, I adapt quickly to multicultural teams and respect diverse perspectives. My experience in cross-cultural environments has strengthened my ability to build inclusive working relationships and communicate effectively across cultures.

softSkills.title: Collaborative Team Player
softSkills.description: I actively contribute to team goals by sharing ideas, supporting peers, and maintaining clear communication. In fast-paced environments, I ensure coordination and reliability — helping teams stay aligned and deliver results efficiently.

softSkills.title: Effective Communication
softSkills.description: I communicate technical concepts in a clear and practical way, making it easier for both technical and non-technical stakeholders to understand risks, controls, and solutions — a critical skill in GRC and security operations.

softSkills.title: Adaptability & Work Ethic
softSkills.description: From hands-on roles in fast-paced workplaces to complex technical project environments, I bring a proactive attitude, reliability, and the ability to quickly learn and adjust to new challenges and shifting priorities.

softSkills.title: GRC Mindset in Team Environments
softSkills.description: I understand that governance, risk, and compliance are not just technical — they require collaboration, communication, and alignment across teams. I focus on bridging the gap between technical controls and real business needs.
